A C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T V 

I

isFlagHandled() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Indicates whether this flag has been marked as handled during the current parsing phase.
isLongFlag() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Returns true if the flag is a long flag type, for example: --verbose.
isLongOption(String) - Static method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Queries whether the specified token represents a long flag starting with double leading dashes (--), following the GNU convention.
isNegativeNumber(String) - Static method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Determines if the specified token represents a real negative numeric value.
isOption(String) - Static method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Verifies the specified token represents a valid command flag or option.
isRequired() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Indicates whether this flag is mandatory for the current parsing operation, according to the defined constraints.
isShortFlag() - Method in class cli.FlagRule
Returns true if the flag is a short flag type, for example: -v.
isShortOption(String) - Static method in class cli.CommandFlagParser
Queries whether the specified token represents a valid short flag or option, following the POSIX convention.
iterator() - Method in class cli.FlagRegistry
Returns an iterator over the collection of defined rules.
